rule_metadata.name: browser_pass
rule_metadata.author: swood
rule_metadata.description: This module is intended for forensicators and pen-testers to find passwords in memory that can help their case/engagement.

rules.rule_text:
rule browser_pass
{
	meta:
		author = "swood"
		description = "This module is intended for forensicators and pen-testers to find passwords in memory that can help their case/engagement."
		reference = "https://github.com/swoodsec/YARA-RULES/blob/master/browserpass.yar"

	strings:
		$1 = "Passwd="
		$2 = "passwd="
		$3 = "Password="
		$4 = "password="
		$5 = "Pwd="
		$6 = "pwd="
		$7 = "Pass="
		$8 = "pass="
		$9 = "session_password="
		$10 = "Session_Password="

	condition:
		any of them
}
